schema.domain_count: integer — number of distinct domains assigned
schema.total_nodes: integer — total nodes mapped across all domains
schema.node_to_domain_map: object — {node_id: domain_id} for every assigned node
schema.generation_rules: object — method, version, rule_count, evaluation, basis

domain_record_schema.domain_id: string — DOM-NN (zero-padded to 2 digits; sorted alphabetically by domain name)
domain_record_schema.name: string — UPPER_SNAKE_CASE domain label
domain_record_schema.node_ids: array[string] — sorted list of NODE-NNNN IDs in this domain

dom_group_record_schema.included_nodes: array[string] — same as node_ids (Phase 5 compatibility field)
dom_group_record_schema.derivation_rule: string — rule_id from DOMAIN_RULES that matched this cluster set
dom_group_record_schema.path_patterns: array[string] — sorted list of cluster names that mapped to this domain

generation_rules_schema.rule_count: integer — number of derivation rules in DOMAIN_RULES

validation_status_values.PASS: All nodes from canonical_topology assigned to a domain
validation_status_values.PARTIAL: Some nodes unassigned (should not occur with default catch-all rule)

dual_format_note: dom_groups is included alongside domains for Phase 5 (phase_05_build_binding_envelope) compatibility. Both represent the same domain assignment. dom_groups uses dom_id, dom_label, included_nodes, derivation_rule, path_patterns; domains uses domain_id, name, node_ids, node_count.
